title: Complaints/Reports not Cognizable by the Department. When, upon
content: 21 evaluation based on the preliminary examination of the complainants and available 22 records, the MWPB or the operating unit assigned to the complaint/report determines that 23 the complaint/report does not involve overseas employment matters, or similar cases 24 which do not fall under the jurisdiction of the Department, the MWPB or operating unit 25 shall refer the matter to the proper office or government agency and instrumentality for 26 other appropriate action. 27 28 29 Proceedings Before the Department on Illegal Recruitment, Trafficking in Persons 30 Cases, or Recruitment Violations 31 32
